popularStory.headline: History of Narcissus Graham
popularStory.description: Narcissus Graham (1762-1829) son Of Rev. John Graham, Jr, and Mary Sheldon was born in Suffield Ct. He later migrated to Sumpter Co. South Carolina where he married Unity Gayle, daughter of Christophe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset於1477年6月22日出生在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Grey23歲，母親Lady Cecily Bonville16歲。他於1509年1月6日與Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年10月10日在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset于1477年6月22日出生在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Grey23岁，母亲Lady Cecily Bonville16岁。他于1509年1月6日与Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年10月10日在英国英格兰越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年53岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
German: dialect variant of   Grau  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Marquess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Marquis  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Dorset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  See  Dorsett  .

variants.name: Dorsett
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Dorset, named from Old English Dorn, an early name of Dorchester (of British origin, from durn ‘fist’, probably referring to fist-sized pebbles) + sǣte ‘dwellers’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset was born on 22 June 1477, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Grey, was 23 and his mother, Lady Cecily Bonville, was 16. He married Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset on 6 January 1509. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 October 1530, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset est né le 22 juin 1477, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Grey, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecily Bonville, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset le 6 janvier 1509. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1530, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset am 22. Juni 1477 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Grey 23 und seine Mutter Lady Cecily Bonville 16. Er hat am 6. Januar 1509 Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1530 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset è nato il il 22 giugno 1477 nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Grey, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Lady Cecily Bonville, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset il 6 gennaio 1509. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1530, nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Astley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorsetが1477年6月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Greyは23歳，母Lady Cecily Bonvilleは16歳であった。1509年1月6日にMargaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorsetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年10月10日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで53歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset(이)가 1477년 6월 22일 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grey(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Cecily Bonville(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1509년 1월 6일 Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset nasceu em 22 de junho de 1477, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grey, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecily Bonville, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset em 6 de janeiro de 1509. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1530, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset родился 22 июня 1477 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grey было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecily Bonville, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset 6 января 1509 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 октября 1530 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия.
